simple_types.name: FS_Type
simple_types.code: type FS_Type is (FS_Unknown, FS_Unix, FS_Unix_Case_Insensitive, FS_Windows);

access_types.name: FS_String_Access
access_types.code: type FS_String_Access is access all FS_String;

generic_instantiations.name: Free
generic_instantiations.code:
procedure Free is new Ada.Unchecked_Deallocation
  (FS_String, FS_String_Access);
